title: Launcher3 GridCustomizationsProvider exported without read/write permission
notes: GridCustomizationsProvider exported=true without readPermission/writePermission. Manifest has TODO comment: 'Add proper permissions.' call() checks BIND_WALLPAPER but query()/update() have no permission. Any app can query grid options and call update() on /default_grid to change home screen layout (triggers full launcher model reload) or /set_icon_themed to toggle icons.
